source: Belanjawanku 2024/2025 Expenditure Guide (EPF/KWSP with the Social Wellbeing Research Centre, Universiti Malaya). Household figures are the Klang Valley reference; cross-checked against EPF media coverage of the 2024/2025 release.
notes: Belanjawanku publishes ONE monthly reference budget per household composition per city (a 'reasonable standard of living' estimate) — it does NOT publish a Basic/Adequate/Enhanced split per household. The three-tier Basic/Adequate/Enhanced structure belongs to KWSP's separate Retirement Income Adequacy (RIA) *savings* framework, captured here in `retirement_targets_rm`. Household figures below are the Klang Valley reference (Malaysia's highest-cost region); other cities run lower. FLAG: only the Klang Valley figures were retrievable from public coverage — consult the full published guide for city-specific and additional household types.
